text:
Once upon an autumn morning, there was a little girl named Holly who loved collecting tiny caterpillars. She'd find them munching on leaf buds and leaves on her windowsill.

One sunny afternoon, while Holly was gently stroking a particularly colorful caterpillar she had found, she heard a tiny voice whispering beside her ear.

"Weren't you just adorable?" asked SNibble the caterpillar.

Holly smiled. "I guess I am, huh? How do you know so much about collecting friends?

SNibble thought for a moment, then said, "Well, I like to nibble on all sorts of things. I love tulips! Their petals open in such a pretty way.

"One day, I thought, what if I could have a pet caterpillar? I'd call him Fluffy. I guess I've decided to be the lucky one," Holly said.

A friendly ladybug fluttered nearby...

"You could always adopt me!" she chirped.
